steps.title: Apply the radians-to-degrees conversion formula
steps.content:
To convert from radians to degrees, multiply by $$\frac{180°}{\pi}$$. Set up the calculation with the given angle of $\frac{9\pi}{20}$ radians:
$$\frac{9\pi}{20} \times \frac{180°}{\pi}$$

steps.title: Cancel pi and simplify
steps.content:
The $\pi$ terms cancel in the numerator and denominator:
$$\frac{9 \times 180°}{20}$$

Compute the numerator and divide:
$$\frac{1620°}{20} = 81°$$

The angle measures 81 degrees.
